message:
Add comprehensive Node.js polyfills for full API compatibility

Implement all high-priority missing APIs:
- Timer functions (setTimeout, setInterval, clearTimeout, clearInterval, setImmediate)
- TextEncoder/TextDecoder with UTF-8 support
- URL/URLSearchParams for URL parsing
- AbortController/AbortSignal for request cancellation
- crypto.randomUUID and crypto.getRandomValues
- require() with module registry for Node.js-style imports
- Full fs module (existsSync, readFileSync, writeFileSync, readdirSync, statSync, mkdirSync, unlinkSync, promises)

All 58 Node.js compatibility tests now pass.
